title: EditableSigns (Legacy)
description: Vanilla should have sign edit functionality added to be honest (Yay 1.20 finally did!)
body:
## This resource is now archived (won't be updated to newer versions) as Minecraft 1.20 finally added this much-needed functionality once and for all!

Simple one class plugin to allow signs to be edited by **right-clicking it (while main hand empty + offhand not holding any dye item)**.
Only works if you have permission to place blocks at that location. (If BlockPlaceEvent is not cancelled)

There is a permission _**editablesigns.use**_ that is true by default
There is also a command **_/editablesigns reload_** with the permission **_editablesigns.reload_** which does what you think it does

*(Tho not tested, should in theory work on 1.8 - 1.16 as well)*


![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/editablesigns/1.gif)


[**_View default config_**](https://gist.github.com/LOOHP/3524ff081d0bcccfc7dfe327c3c9d0cc)
